pr-evidence/benchmark-plan-probe-fixture.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 found programmatic fixture/handoff mismatch and fixture child artifact collision gaps; both were fixed with config validation, concrete child-path collision checks, and regression tests.
what_changed: benchmark_plan can generate deterministic Qwen3 engine-probe fixtures before planned native probes and derive fixture-backed handoff JSON paths from BACKEND=DIR CLI flags.
pr-evidence/benchmark-plan-probe-fixture.why: Native vLLM/SGLang adapter work needs reproducible handoff/payload fixtures in the same command plan that runs engine probes, without manually creating handoff files first.
